# Success at School — Full Reference

> Success at School is a premium tutoring provider for students from Kindergarten to Year 12, based in Western Sydney, New South Wales, Australia. Founded in 2003 by former classroom teacher Lisa Duong, it specialises in Opportunity Class (OC), NAPLAN, and Selective High School placement test preparation, alongside general primary and high school tutoring. Tuition is delivered in small classes and one-on-one, both on-site and online.

## What is Success at School?

Success at School is an educational organisation and local tutoring business serving families across Western Sydney — including Plumpton, Hassall Grove, Quakers Hill, Mount Druitt, and Blacktown. It combines exam-focused preparation programs (OC, NAPLAN, Selective) with ongoing subject tutoring in English, Mathematics, Science, and Humanities. The teaching model emphasises small class sizes, individualised attention, and measurable progress.

- Founded: 2003
- Founder: Lisa Duong (former classroom teacher)
- Levels served: Kindergarten to Year 12
- Region: Western Sydney, NSW, Australia
- Delivery: small classes and one-on-one; on-site and online
- Language: English (en-AU)

## Contact

- Email: hello@successatschool.com.au
- Phone: 1300 572 428
- Enrol: https://successatschool.com.au/enrol
- Contact page: https://successatschool.com.au/marketing/contact
- Hours: Monday–Friday 9:00am–9:00pm, Saturday 9:00am–5:00pm, Sunday closed

## Campuses

1. Plumpton — Plumpton Neighbourhood Centre, 337 Rooty Hill Rd N, Plumpton NSW 2761
2. Hassall Grove — Hassall Grove Neighbourhood Centre, 25 Melanie St, Hassall Grove NSW 2761
3. Quakers Hill — Breed Australia, Nirimba Education Precinct, Warawara Cct, Quakers Hill NSW 2763

## Programs

- OC Preparation (https://successatschool.com.au/marketing/oc-preparation): Preparation for the Opportunity Class placement test, typically sat in Year 4 for entry into Year 5. Covers reading, mathematical reasoning, and thinking skills.
- Selective High School Preparation (https://successatschool.com.au/marketing/selective-preparation): Preparation for the NSW Selective High School placement test, sat in Year 6 for entry into Year 7. Covers reading, mathematical reasoning, thinking skills, and the writing task.
- NAPLAN Preparation (https://successatschool.com.au/marketing/naplan-preparation): Literacy and numeracy preparation aligned to the National Assessment Program — Literacy and Numeracy, for Years 3, 5, 7, and 9.
- Primary Tutoring: Core subject support for Kindergarten to Year 6 — English and Mathematics fundamentals.
- High School Tutoring: Subject tutoring for Years 7–12 across English, Mathematics, Science, and Humanities.

See all programs: https://successatschool.com.au/marketing/programs

## Track record (self-reported)

- 2,000+ students tutored
- 98% parent satisfaction
- 15+ years experience
- 92% improvement rate

## Frequently asked questions

Q: What are your fees and how do payment plans work?
A: Fees vary by program, year level, and session format (group or individual). Flexible fortnightly and monthly payment plans are available. Contact Success at School for a personalised fee schedule.

Q: Do you offer small group or one-on-one tutoring?
A: Both. Small classes support collaborative learning, and dedicated one-on-one tutoring is available for students who need individual attention. Families can mix both formats across subjects.

Q: Can we try a lesson before committing?
A: Yes. A no-obligation trial lesson is offered so families can experience the teaching approach before committing.

Q: What year levels and subjects do you cover?
A: Kindergarten through Year 12 across English, Mathematics, Science, and Humanities, plus specialised OC, NAPLAN, and Selective School exam preparation.

Q: What happens if my child misses a lesson?
A: Lessons can be rescheduled with at least 24 hours' notice at no extra cost. For unforeseen circumstances, make-up times or session materials are provided.
